accurate.why: All claims align with the bill text and accurately characterize the War Powers framework invoked.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated or contradictory claims; all content traces to the bill text.

states_purpose.why: Clearly states the resolution directs removal of US Armed Forces from unauthorized hostilities with Iran.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Notes the War Powers Resolution and related expedited-procedure statutes invoked by the resolution.

exceptions_conditions.why: Captures the rule-of-construction carve-outs for defense, intelligence, partner assistance, and evacuation.

effective_dates.why: The bill specifies no effective dates, sunsets, or deadlines.

major_provisions_covered.why: Covers the directive to remove forces, the authorization exception, and the rule-of-construction exceptions.

objective_tone.why: Neutral, descriptive tone without advocacy or editorializing.

concise.why: Compact with no padding or repetition.

correct_entities.why: Correctly names Iran, Operation Epic Fury, and the War Powers Resolution.

correct_figures.why: The February 28, 2026 date stated matches the bill text.
